notes: v31 — Order Block + Volume (OBV) strategy. Replaces the v30 multi-confluence scorer. Every trade requires a volume-confirmed Order Block (fresh or first retest only) plus live volume confirmation at entry.

sl_config.comment: SL sits just beyond the far edge of the traded Order Block. Target defaults to 2R, or the nearest opposing Order Block if closer.

volume_config.comment: RVOL = current bar volume / rolling 20-bar average volume.

time_filters.comment: No new trades after 14:30 — option premium decay kills entries

trade_limits.comment: Hard cap to avoid overtrading / chasing OB retests all day.

mandatory_gates.comment: No trade fires without a volume-confirmed Order Block (fresh or first retest) AND live volume confirmation (impulse RVOL or current-candle RVOL spike).
